category_title: Year 4 student with ADHD symptoms and Literacy difficulties
scenario_title: Independent writing task and sentence formation during Literacy
minimal_context: Yiannis is working independently on a sentence formation and text creation task during a 90-minute Literacy block.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start your independent writing task. You need to work on your own to form sentences and create a text.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Writing is too hard. I don't want to do it right now.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to write down what happened in the story.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: The boy ran away and then he found a dog and then they went to the park and then they played ball and then it got dark and then they went home.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep going and write the next part of the text on your own.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No! I'm not doing it by myself anymore!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start your independent writing task. You need to work on your own to form sentences and create a text.

STUDENT: Writing is too hard. I don't want to do it right now.

TUTOR: Just try your best to write down what happened in the story.

STUDENT: The boy ran away and then he found a dog and then they went to the park and then they played ball and then it got dark and then they went home.

TUTOR: Keep going and write the next part of the text on your own.

STUDENT: No! I'm not doing it by myself anymore!

task.content: Independent writing tasks and sentence formation

context.environment: Literacy hour does not last for one hour, but ninety minutes, basically two periods of 45 minutes
context.materials: Class timetable was taped on his desk
context.social_setting: Working on his own in a mainstream classroom
context.time_context: First two periods of the day

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When forming sentences and asked to work on his own
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Refused to work on his own; rarely used punctuation and as a result, most of the texts he created had very long sentences
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Writing was a very daunting task for him

behavior_patterns.condition: During class work in Literacy or Numeracy
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Found it very difficult to concentrate and complete tasks in the given time
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Seemed to be distracted the most during Literacy
